title: [WIP] papr: skip double shell process
body:
and be sure to relabel $PWD so we don't hit the SELinux problem that
we worked-around with a "bash -c sh"

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, with fingers crossed for happy tests.
